name: Heavy Chain
description: AI-powered Image Generation Platform for Fashion | AI駆動のアパレル向け画像生成プラットフォーム

VITE_REMBG_MODEL_BASE_URL.description: Optional model base URL override. The bundled same-origin silueta model is used by default.

VITE_REMBG_SILUETA_MODEL_URL.description: Optional explicit silueta model URL. Defaults to same-origin /models/silueta.onnx.

VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.description: Stripe publishable key (optional, for future payment features)
